FAYWELL UNIVERSITY, Notable History
Built on top of an abandoned prison, FayWell University is a private 4 year college with a acceptance rate of 10%, Either ones who study hard enough or ones with enough money can get confidently get in without real worry. in 2018, FWU opened their doors to Demi-Humans after endless scrutiny from the growing Demi-Human population. In 2020, an armed individual took the lives of many people around the outskirts of FWU campus, forcing the University to close for 29 months. Now a branded beacon of hope FayWell University has amplified onsite security cameras and police officers on campus. Students of FWU have reported certain parts of campus are 'haunted', giving them an endless sense of unease. FayWell is actively trying to paint itself as a peaceful, safe school.
